stories.title: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall — Free Repair Available

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: 25,000+ Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Towers — fall hazard. Platform can loosen and detach. 11 falls, 3 injuries confirmed.

Stop use now. Free repair: guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall or 800-524-3555 ⚠️ #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Still seeing Kitchen Helper Towers in use — they were recalled in May 2026 due to a fall hazard. 25,000+ units. Amazon, Target, Walmart.

Free repair kit at guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall ⚠️ #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall: Over 25,000 Units, Fall Hazard, Free Repair Available

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall

#### Image 1A — Social (X/Twitter, 1200×675)
**Gemini Prompt:**
A toddler-sized wooden kitchen helper standing tower photographed in a softly lit home kitchen setting. The tower is empty and slightly tilted, with the internal platform visibly loose. Warm morning light from a nearby window. Neutral tones — white cabinetry, wood grain floor, cream walls. A small stuffed animal sits nearby to suggest a child's space. Clean visual space in the bottom third for text overlay. Photorealistic illustration style, family-home mood, slight tension in the composition. No text, no watermarks, no human figures.

**Text Overlay (Canva):** "RECALL" / "Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower" (red alert badge + white text on dark bar)
**Usage:** X/Twitter post, Facebook long-form

#### Image 1B — Article Hero (1200×630)
**Gemini Prompt:**
Wide-angle illustration of a bright, organized family kitchen with a wooden toddler standing tower prominently in the foreground, platform area visible and slightly misaligned to suggest instability. Warm domestic lighting, family-friendly color palette (soft blues, warm wood tones). Clean composition in bottom third for potential overlay. No human figures. No text. No watermarks. Photorealistic illustration style.

**Usage:** Article featured image (uploaded to WordPress)

---

research.facts:
Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall
**Decision:** NEW STORY — Not previously covered in COS Parenting pipeline. Recall announced May 14, 2026. Verified fall hazard with confirmed child injuries.
**Verified Facts:**
| Fact | Priority | Confidence | Source |
|------|----------|-----------|--------|
| Recall affects 25,235 Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Towers | HIGH (unit count) | HIGH | cpsc.gov official recall page |
| Recall announced May 14, 2026 | MEDIUM | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Platform inside tower can loosen or detach over time | HIGH | HIGH | cpsc.gov, schiffmanfirm.com |
| This poses a fall hazard to young children | HIGH | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| CPSC received 11 reports of children falling | HIGH (stats/numbers) | HIGH | cpsc.gov, dailyhornet.com |
| 3 injuries confirmed: bloody nose and bruises | HIGH (stats) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Affects Classic and Contemporary styles in nine colors | MEDIUM | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold at Amazon, Target, Guidecraft.com, Wayfair, Walmart, Maisonette, Overstock | HIGH (retailer accuracy) | HIGH | cpsc.gov, schiffmanfirm.com |
| Sale period: June 2022 through October 2023 | MEDIUM | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Price: approximately $200 | HIGH (price) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| REMEDY: Free repair kit (not a full refund) | HIGH (action item) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Contact: 800-524-3555 (8 AM-8 PM ET, Mon-Fri) | HIGH (phone) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Email: ProductSupport@guidecraft.com | HIGH (contact) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Website: guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall | HIGH (URL) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Action: Stop use immediately | HIGH | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
**Freshness:** Recall announced May 14, 2026. Not previously covered in this pipeline. Action is still urgent — families who bought this product have not had a safety alert from this channel yet.

coloradosprings.gov/ParkSystemMasterPlan 🌳 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: Pikes Peak Hill Climb This Sunday — Tickets NOT Sold at Gate

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
HEADS UP: Pikes Peak Hill Climb is THIS SUNDAY June 21 — Father's Day.

Tickets are ONLINE ONLY. NOT sold at the gate. Buy now at ppihc.org before they sell out. Kids under 10 are free on Race Day. 🏁 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: Pikes Peak Hill Climb Is This Sunday — Tickets Are Online Only and Expected to Sell Out

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Pikes Peak Hill Climb

A dramatic mountain road scene representing the Pikes Peak Highway — a winding two-lane road ascending through rocky alpine terrain at high elevation, with a vivid blue Colorado sky and distant mountain peaks. A racing car is suggested as a sleek blurred shape mid-corner, with dust trails for motion. Families illustrated as small silhouettes watching from a rocky viewpoint. Late dawn light — deep blue-purple sky transitioning to golden sunrise. Clean space in the bottom third for text overlay. Exciting, adrenaline-forward, Colorado mountain adventure mood. No text. stories.title: D20 Names Dr. Susan Field Interim Superintendent — What Families Should Know

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
D20 families: Dr. Susan Field is interim superintendent for 2026-27. 19 years with D20. Former principal at Woodmen-Roberts Elementary.

Schools operate normally. Here's what to know before fall. 🏫 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

research.facts:
D20 Names Dr. Susan Field Interim Superintendent
**Decision:** NEW STORY (first coverage in COS Parenting pipeline). Major local education leadership change affecting 26,000 D20 students. Happened May 15-19, 2026 — not previously covered in this pipeline.
